name: Shadow Grader
goal: Add gemma4 shadow grading with tool-calling to all Opus grading events and post concordance reports to Slack

tasks.name: OllamaClient.post_chat
tasks.description: Add post_chat method to OllamaClient for Ollama /api/chat endpoint with tool-calls support and primary/fallback URL behavior

steps.description: Write TestPostChat test class in test_ollama_client.py with _make_chat_response helper and 6 test cases
steps.expected: Tests added after existing TestCreateModel class

steps.description: Run new tests to confirm they fail with AttributeError
steps.expected: ERRORS — AttributeError: OllamaClient has no attribute post_chat

steps.description: Add post_chat, _chat_via_fallback, and _read_chat_response methods to OllamaClient in ollama_client.py
Run all ollama_client tests to confirm new and existing tests pass
steps.expected: All TestPostChat tests PASS, all existing tests PASS

steps.description: Stage changes

tasks.name: ShadowGrader class
tasks.description: Create shadow_grader.py with ShadowGrader class: Ollama chat tool-calling loop, 3 read-only tools (read_file/grep_files/git_diff), path validation, think-tag stripping

steps.description: Create test_shadow_grader.py with TestGradeWithTools (7 cases) and TestExecuteTool (6 cases)
Run tests to confirm they fail with ModuleNotFoundError
Create shadow_grader.py with SHADOW_TOOLS, MAX_TOOL_STEPS=5, and ShadowGrader class
steps.expected: New file created with full implementation

steps.description: Run shadow grader tests to confirm they all pass
Stage changes

tasks.name: OrchestratorTools shadow helpers and delta capture
tasks.description: Add ShadowGrader import, _last_grader_delta instance var, delta storage in _do_grader_send_and_poll, and helper methods: _parse_tool_calls_from_delta, _compute_concordance, _format_shadow_slack_message, _run_shadow_and_report, _fire_shadow_thread

steps.description: Add TestParseToolCallsFromDelta, TestComputeConcordance, TestFormatShadowSlackMessage test classes to test_orchestrator_mcp.py
Run new tests to confirm they fail with AttributeError
steps.expected: AttributeError — helper methods don't exist yet

steps.description: Add 'from ironclaude.shadow_grader import ShadowGrader' import to orchestrator_mcp.py
steps.expected: Import added after existing grader import

steps.description: Add self._shadow_grader and self._last_grader_delta instance variables in OrchestratorTools.__init__
steps.expected: Two lines added after self._local_grader instantiation

steps.description: Add self._last_grader_delta = delta at each successful return point in _do_grader_send_and_poll; add self._last_grader_delta = '' on timeout path
Add helper methods after _call_local_grader: _parse_tool_calls_from_delta, _compute_concordance, _format_shadow_slack_message, _run_shadow_and_report, _fire_shadow_thread
Run new helper tests to confirm they pass
Run full orchestrator test suite to confirm no regressions
Stage changes

tasks.name: Wire shadow into spawn_worker / kill_worker / approve_plan
tasks.description: Update Opus grader prompts to allow tool use, add TestShadowThreadFiring tests, fire _fire_shadow_thread after each _call_grader call in spawn_worker, kill_worker, approve_plan

steps.description: Add TestShadowThreadFiring test class (3 tests) to test_orchestrator_mcp.py
Run wiring tests to confirm they fail

Update spawn_worker Opus grader prompt: replace 'Respond with valid JSON only — no markdown, no explanation:' with 'You may use Read and Bash to investigate before responding.\nWhen ready, output ONLY a valid JSON object on a single line:'
steps.expected: Prompt updated in spawn_worker system_prompt f-string

steps.description: Update kill_worker Opus grader prompt with same change
steps.expected: Prompt updated in kill_worker system_prompt f-string

steps.description: Update approve_plan Opus grader prompt with same change
steps.expected: Prompt updated in approve_plan system_prompt f-string

steps.description: In spawn_worker, after each _call_grader() call, add opus_tool_calls capture and _fire_shadow_thread call (both Opus call sites: infrastructure error path and low-confidence path)
steps.expected: Shadow thread fired after both _call_grader calls in spawn_worker

steps.description: In kill_worker, add _shadow_worker repo lookup before _call_grader(), then capture tool calls and fire shadow thread after
steps.expected: Shadow thread fired after _call_grader in kill_worker

steps.description: In approve_plan, add _shadow_worker repo lookup before _call_grader(), then capture tool calls and fire shadow thread after
steps.expected: Shadow thread fired after _call_grader in approve_plan

steps.description: Run wiring tests to confirm they pass
Run full test suite to confirm no regressions
Stage changes
